scope.summary: Advance the OCI Always Free ADB acceptance harness without claiming an operator-gated live result.
out_of_scope: Running the credentialed OCI acceptance against a real tenancy.

entry_points.name: scripts/e2e/real_adb_tcps_signoff.sh
entry_points.trace: The operator-gated harness reaches the live ADB acceptance boundary.

limitations: OCI credentials and an Always Free ADB are operator-provided.
